job_info.role_description: Develop AI-powered applications for commercial and research-driven projects, working alongside AI specialists to push the boundaries of innovation.

soft_skills: Ability to troubleshoot complex software issues

job_responsibilities: Design and develop full-stack applications utilizing Python, JavaScript, and TypeScript.
Architect scalable and efficient systems to support AI-driven functionalities.
Work closely with AI researchers and data scientists to integrate machine learning models into applications.
Debug, document, and enhance software solutions to ensure optimal user experience.
Collaborate with cross-functional teams to transform business needs into technical solutions.

To deploy machine learning models to production
